title: Teltonika TAP100 AP without PoE Injector
description: AP100 is the first-ever Teltonika Networks Access Point. It is equipped with 2.4GHz WiFi with WPA2/WPA3 security standards. For network connectivity has 1x 100Mb/s port with PoE 802.3af support. Web management or RMS Management for configuration multiple devices at once. Free access to RMS Management for 24 months 2.4GHz with WPA2/WPA3 security standards 1x 100Mb/s Ethernet with PoE 802.3af support RMS management Unit Quick Start guide
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 2 Roaming Yes Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 2 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 190 Width [mm] 158 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 158 Hardware CPU frequency [MHz] 580 RAM [MB] 64
